docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-31-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BANBURY, MATTHEW

DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE MOTORCYCLE WAS FURNISHED TO DEFENDANT PURSUANT TO AN AGREEMENT BETWEEN DEFENDANT AND INLINE PERFORMANCE, LLC. PURSUANT TO CCP 116.420, PLAINTIFF MAY NOT SUE AS AN ASSIGNEE OF THE LLC'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES/LOSS OF THE MOTORCYCLE. THE PROPER PLAINTIFF FOR SUCH A CLAIM IS THE LLC. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY YU, JUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT BANBURY, MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY YU, JUSTIN BANBURY, MATTHEW
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY YU, JUSTIN BANBURY, MATTHEW

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
